title: I Release Fear of Inheritance Loss and Allow Safe Structure
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that taxes and legal systems will erase the wealth you have built
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 73 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the fear that taxes or legal complications will reduce what you leave. The allow names the calm confidence that the right structures and advisors protect every asset.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 73 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when fear of inheritance tax, legal fees, or complicated rules has you avoiding the planning that would actually protect your assets.

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 73 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 73 theme: releasing fear of taxes and inheritance loss. The release names the belief that legal systems will eat away what you have built. The allow names the settled confidence that the right structures preserve and pass it on in full.
I am ready to release every belief that taxes, fees, or legal complexity will reduce or erase the wealth I am building. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the calm confidence that the right structures and advisors protect every asset and pass it on in full. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 73 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
